title: GET /books — List all books with author filter
evidence: src/main/java/com/example/books/BookController.java:30-36 list() method supports ?author= param; BookControllerTest:62-70 verifies filtering

title: GET /books/{id} — Get a single book by ID
evidence: src/main/java/com/example/books/BookController.java:38-43 get() method returns 404 if not found

title: Java + Spring Boot framework
evidence: pom.xml:4-8 Spring Boot parent, BookController uses @RestController, @GetMapping etc.

title: SQLite database storage
evidence: pom.xml:30-33 sqlite-jdbc dependency, Book entity uses @Entity, BookRepository extends JpaRepository

title: JSON responses with HTTP status codes
evidence: BookController uses ResponseEntity with .status(201), .ok(), .notFound(), .noContent(); tests verify status codes

title: Input validation for required fields
evidence: Book.java:13,16 use @NotBlank on title and author; ValidationExceptionHandler.java handles MethodArgumentNotValidException

title: Health check endpoint GET /health
evidence: BookController.java:18-21 health() returns {"status": "ok"}; BookControllerTest:30-34 verifies it

title: Working source code delivered
evidence: All 6 .java files present and compile; mvn clean compile succeeded in 3.076s

title: README.md with setup and run instructions
evidence: README.md:1-36 documents requirements, run, test, endpoints with examples

title: At least 3 unit/integration tests
evidence: BookControllerTest.java has 5 tests: healthEndpointReturnsOk, createBookReturns201AndPersists, createBookWithoutTitleReturns400, listBooksFiltersByAuthor, updateAndDeleteBook; all pass
